name: BLACK DIAMOND FINANCIAL, LLC
address: 855 SW YATES STREET STE 102, BEND, OR 97702

fr.elements: Main Building; Vehicle Parking Area; Roof System; Landscaped Area; Pedestrian Walkways; Perimeter Fencing
fr.recommendations: To support effective emergency response on the property, ensuring unobstructed and well-marked pedestrian walkways could enhance navigation and movement for responders. Clearly defined and adequately sized entry points for emergency vehicles in the vehicle parking area may facilitate quicker access. Regular maintenance of the landscaped area, especially trimming or thinning where needed, could prevent obstruction of sightlines and improve visibility for coordinating operations. Clearly identifiable building markers and any crucial utility shut-off locations on the main building may assist responders in time-sensitive situations. Ensuring that perimeter fencing allows for emergency access or has emergency access points can further support timely response efforts and efficient navigation throughout the property.

wildfire.conditions: Vegetation Adjacent to Structure; Scattered Trees; Limited Defensible Space; Vegetated Perimeter; Vegetation Adjacent to Access Route
wildfire.recommendations: Enhancing defensible space around the structure by increasing the separation between vegetation and the building could reduce potential exposure to wildfire. Managing scattered trees by selectively thinning and trimming lower branches may lessen the continuity of fuels and discourage the spread of fire. Ensuring that vegetation does not accumulate within close proximity to access routes will support safe and efficient movement for firefighters and emergency responders. Concentrating efforts on creating well-maintained open spaces around the structure can also help prevent the lateral movement of fire. Reducing the vegetation density along the vegetated perimeter and adjacent to access routes could improve overall property preparedness and resilience. Continued management of these areas will support long-term efforts to mitigate wildfire impacts on the property.
